# VERSIONS — pinned tool versions for the subtelomeric-community pipeline

**Generated by** `validate-reproducibility-paths` (agent-685, 2026-05-05).
**Scope.** Versions for every tool cited in any of the 13 `paper_prep/surveys/SURVEY_*.md` documents and `MANUSCRIPT_SKELETON.md`. Values come from (1) explicit version strings in the surveys (the pinned cases), (2) the runtime environment in which the analysis was executed (Guix profile + system toolchain on the moosefs login host, audited 2026-05-05), and (3) script-internal `library(...)` / `import` declarations.

> **Methods-section disclosure.** Two surveys explicitly flag version-pinning as required for the Methods (`SURVEY_01 §5 #11` for the pipeline core, `SURVEY_02 §5 #2` for Liftoff). All names below should be re-cited in the Methods exactly as listed.

---

## 1. Core pangenome / alignment toolchain (pipeline backbone)

| Tool | Version (pinned in survey) | Runtime version (2026-05-05 host) | Source / role |
|---|---|---|---|
| **wfmash** | `v0.23.0-41-gb5f0ff1c` (SURVEY_01 §1, §3, also `do_not_overfilter` branch for RPE-1 SURVEY_09 §1.1) | `/home/erikg/.guix-profile/bin/wfmash` | All-vs-all PAF generation at `-p 95 -t 48`; produced 18,827 PAF.gz files. |
| **pggb** | (not pinned in surveys; SURVEY_01 §5 #11 explicitly flags) | `/home/erikg/.guix-profile/bin/pggb` (Guix profile current) | Pangenome graph construction at `-p 95 -D /scratch` on 15,668 PHRs. |
| **odgi** | (not pinned in surveys; SURVEY_01 §5 #11 explicitly flags) | `/home/erikg/.guix-profile/bin/odgi` (`odgi --version` returns no command; check Guix profile manifest for exact commit) | `odgi similarity --all -P` for the 15,668 × 15,668 Jaccard matrix; `odgi untangle -e 50000 -m 1000` for pedigree analysis (SURVEY_14 §3). |
| **impg** | `0.4.1` (current `cargo install impg`) | `/home/erikg/.cargo/bin/impg` (verified `impg --version` → `impg 0.4.1`) | Inter-chromosomal region scan (sliding window) — used by `find-multichr-regions-incremental.py`. |
| **minimap2** | `v2.30` (SURVEY_01 §1.5, §3) | `2.24-r1122` (system; **discrepancy with survey, must be re-pinned in Methods**) | Cross-aligner agreement for chimera flagging at `-x asm20`, mapq 60 cutoff. |
| **sweepga / fastga** | (no version stated; referenced by `all-vs-all.fastga.sh`, `all-vs-all.sweepga.sh`) | n/a — alternate alignment drivers, not used in the headline analysis | Backup/comparison aligners. |

## 2. Community detection and similarity

| Tool / package | Version | Source / role |
|---|---|---|
| **R** | `4.3.0` (system `R --version`) | All `*.R` scripts under `scripts/community/`, `scripts/similarity/`, repo root. |
| **igraph** (R package) | (not pinned in surveys; SURVEY_01 §5 #11 explicitly flags) | Leiden clustering inside `detect_communities.R`. Re-pin via `sessionInfo()` from a fresh run. |
| **leidenAlg / leiden.community** algorithm | igraph builtin Leiden (`cluster_leiden(objective_function="modularity", resolution_parameter=…)`) | Used by `detect_communities.R`. |
| **cluster** (R package) | bundled with R 4.3.0 | Silhouette computation. |
| **tidyverse** (R) | bundled (dplyr/tidyr/readr/ggplot2/stringr) | Data wrangling + plotting. |
| **patchwork**, **pheatmap**, **ggrepel**, **scales**, **ggalluvial**, **uwot**, **cowplot** | (R packages; not pinned in surveys) | Plotting suite for `plot-similarity-subtelo.R`, `plot-seq-community-structure.R`, `plot-within-arm-heterogeneity.R`. |
| **plotly**, **shiny**, **htmlwidgets** | (R) | Interactive variant `plot-similarity-subtelo.interactive.R` only. |
| **optparse** (R) | bundled | CLI parsing in `detect_communities.R`. |
| **Python** | `3.7.3` available at `/usr/bin/python3` (host); `python3` invoked by `analyze_hic_communities.py` etc. — actual runtime may use Guix-profile or conda Python (not auto-detected by this audit) | Numpy/Pandas/Scipy/Matplotlib/SciPy/Statsmodels imports listed in script headers (`numpy`, `pandas`, `scipy.stats`, `scipy.spatial.distance`, `scipy.optimize`, `sklearn.manifold` MDS/TSNE, `sklearn.decomposition.PCA`, `statsmodels.stats.weightstats.ztest`, `cooler`). |
| **cooler** | (not pinned in surveys) | mcool / cool ingestion in `analyze_hic_communities.py`. |
| **HiCExplorer** | (mentioned for `.h5` → `.cool` conversion, `hicConvertFormat`) | Pre-processing only. |
| **scikit-learn** | (not pinned) | MDS, TSNE, PCA. |
| **statsmodels** | (not pinned) | `ztest` in heterogeneity analyses. |

## 3. Hi-C / Pore-C / CiFi processing

| Tool | Version (pinned) | Role |
|---|---|---|
| **BWA-MEM2** | (not pinned) | Read alignment for Dip-C and sperm scHi-C; `MAPQ ≥ 20` filter **disabled**, single primary alignment, random-position multimap rule (SURVEY_06 §1.1). |
| **hickit** | (not pinned; `--min-mapq=0` throughout) | 3D modelling pipeline (SURVEY_06 §1.1). |
| **dip-c impute3** | (not pinned; 4 rounds for GM12878; **omitted** for haploid sperm) | Diploid haplotype refinement (SURVEY_06 §1.1, §1.4). |
| **sam2seg** | (not pinned; `-q 0`) | Pre-hickit (SURVEY_06 §1.1). |

## 4. Annotation and repeat / telomere

| Tool | Version (pinned) | Role |
|---|---|---|
| **Liftoff (HPRC remote index)** | (version not stated; SURVEY_02 §5 #2 explicitly flags) | 462 haplotypes via the HPRC annotation index. |
| **Liftoff (JHU)** | `v0.6` (SURVEY_02 §1) | 2 HG002 haplotypes on HG002v1.1. |
| **RepeatMasker** | (not pinned) | TAR1 / (TTAGGG)n / (ACCCTA)n extraction; per-haplotype outputs at `/moosefs/guarracino/HPRCv2/PHR_III/hprc_repeatmasker/*.RepeatMasker.bed.gz`. |
| **TRF** | (not pinned; referenced upstream of RM) | Tandem-repeat finder. |
| **seqtk-telo / RUKKI** | (not pinned; SURVEY_02 §5 #1) | `.telo.tsv` upstream of `hprcv2.1Mb.telo_trimmed.p95.id95.fa.gz`. |
| **samtools** | `1.14` + htslib `1.16` (system) | FASTA indexing and slicing. |

## 5. Assembly provenance (cited per dataset)

| Dataset | Assembly | Version / provenance |
|---|---|---|
| **HPRCv2** | 233 individuals × 2 haplotypes = 465 (CHM13 added → 466 in some counts) | HPRCv2 1Mb-tip subset; assemblies at `/moosefs/pangenomes/HPRCv2/*.fa.gz`. |
| **HG002** | HG002v1.1 (T2T) | Used for Liftoff JHU v0.6 haplotype-specific annotation. |
| **CHM13** | T2T-CHM13v2.0 | Used for centromere coords, repeat-mask reference, Hi-C reference. |
| **WashU pedigree (PAN010 / PAN011 / PAN027 / PAN028)** | T2T (Cechova et al. 2025) | Used for the headline pedigree analysis. |
| **CEPH1463 pedigree** | hifiasm and verkko draft assemblies (Porubsky et al. 2025) | Cross-assembler-validated parent features only. |
| **RPE1v1.1** | Diploid PanSN-named (`RPE1#{1,2}#chr*`) | Single-individual self-vs-self pipeline. |
| **Mouse B6 / CAST T2T** | (in-house T2T) | mouse pipeline window-size scan 1/2/4 Mb. |

## 6. Hi-C / Pore-C / CiFi datasets (provenance, not version)

These are dataset citations, listed here so the Methods can compile a single coherent table.

- HG002 Pore-C, HG002 Hi-C, HG002 CiFi (in-house).
- CHM13 Hi-C, NA19036 Hi-C, HG02148 Hi-C, HG00658 Hi-C, HG02559 Hi-C (in-house / public).
- GM12878 Dip-C: 16 cells (T2T-CHM13v2.0 remap).
- Sperm Dip-C: 20 cells (10X + 10Y) from Xu et al. 2025.
- PBMC Dip-C: hg19-projected (own pipeline note).
- Mouse meiotic Hi-C: Zuo et al. 2021 (4 stages: leptotene / zygotene / pachytene / diplotene).
- RPE-1: async CiFi, async Pore-C, mitotic CiFi (own).

## 7. Pinning the unfilled cells

Two cells flagged by surveys as "version not pinned" remain explicitly **TODO** for the Methods section:

1. **`SURVEY_01 §5 #11` — pggb / odgi / igraph / R-package versions** must be captured from a fresh `sessionInfo()` (R) and Guix profile manifest (binaries) before manuscript freeze. Reproducibility cannot be guaranteed without this.
2. **`SURVEY_02 §5 #2` — HPRC annotation-index Liftoff version** must be obtained from the HPRC distribution metadata; JHU v0.6 alone is insufficient.

These are *not* new analyses; they are config-capture work. Captured here so `compile-manuscript-draft` can flag them in Methods.

## 8. Audit notes

- Permission-restricted scripts (e.g. `community/plot_community_composition.py` returning `Permission denied` to `grep`) are owned by user `guarracino`; readable to him. The audit treats these as present (verified by `ls -l`).
- The `do_not_overfilter` branch of wfmash (used for RPE-1 in SURVEY_09 §1.1) is a one-off feature branch; this should be replaced by the merged equivalent in the canonical wfmash release before publication, OR explicitly named in the Methods with a commit-hash pin.
- The minimap2 version discrepancy between SURVEY_01 §1.5 (`v2.30`) and the host runtime (`2.24-r1122`) is a *runtime audit* artefact — the chimera-flagging analysis was run on a different host with v2.30; the current host is not the analysis host. Methods will pin v2.30 explicitly.
